name: Qian (The Creative)
meaning: pure yang; bold creation succeeds when timing aligns with virtue.

name: Kun (The Receptive)
meaning: pure yin; success comes through devotion and following, not leading.

name: Zhun (Difficulty at Beginning)
meaning: the first shoot through hard ground; helpers are needed at the start.

name: Meng (Youthful Folly)
meaning: ignorance asks once; repeated demands for clarity are met with silence.

name: Xu (Waiting)
meaning: the meal is set; force will not hasten it — wait with sincerity.

name: Song (Conflict)
meaning: halfway truth provokes resistance; meet conflict, do not press it to ruin.

name: Shi (The Army)
meaning: the host marches under a worthy general; lawless force destroys itself.

name: Bi (Holding Together)
meaning: those who join early share the harvest; latecomers find the gate closed.

name: Xiao Chu (Small Taming)
meaning: the wind ruffles heaven; gentle, persistent pressure shapes the strong.

name: Lü (Treading)
meaning: treading on a tiger's tail; courtesy and care prevent the bite.

name: Tai (Peace)
meaning: heaven below, earth above — energies mingle; small departs, great arrives.

name: Pi (Standstill)
meaning: the great withdraws; small powers prevail — keep counsel, await turn.

name: Tong Ren (Fellowship)
meaning: fellowship in the open field; shared purpose succeeds across factions.

name: Da You (Great Possession)
meaning: great holdings demand humility; the sun at noon must not boast.

name: Qian (Modesty)
meaning: mountain beneath the earth; modesty completes the worthy.

name: Yu (Enthusiasm)
meaning: thunder bursts from earth; enthusiasm rallies others when timing is right.

name: Sui (Following)
meaning: the strong follows the gentle; success when one knows when to defer.

name: Gu (Work on the Decayed)
meaning: what the fathers spoiled, the children must mend — patient cleanup.

name: Lin (Approach)
meaning: the great approaches; advance while the season favors, before reversal.

name: Guan (Contemplation)
meaning: look before acting; what is seen above shapes what acts below.

name: Shi He (Biting Through)
meaning: an obstruction in the jaw — bite through with firm judgment.

name: Bi (Grace)
meaning: form adorns substance; beauty helps small affairs, not great decisions.

name: Bo (Splitting Apart)
meaning: the mountain crumbles onto the earth; do not act, endure the wear.

name: Fu (Return)
meaning: the first yang returns at the solstice; the cycle quietly begins again.

name: Wu Wang (Innocence)
meaning: act without calculation; sincerity succeeds, scheming fails.

name: Da Chu (Great Taming)
meaning: great force is held in restraint; nourish strength before unleashing it.

name: Yi (Nourishment)
meaning: watch what nourishes you and what you nourish — body, mind, words.

name: Da Guo (Great Exceeding)
meaning: the load is too great for the beam; extraordinary action is required.

name: Kan (The Abysmal Water)
meaning: the chasm twice over; only sincerity passes through the dark water.

name: Li (The Clinging Fire)
meaning: fire clings to what it burns; the wise cling to what is luminous.

name: Xian (Influence)
meaning: stillness invites; influence works through emptiness, not pressure.

name: Heng (Duration)
meaning: what endures must be flexible at the root; rigid persistence breaks.

name: Dun (Retreat)
meaning: the great withdraw with grace; retreat in good order is success.

name: Da Zhuang (Great Power)
meaning: thunder above heaven; mighty power must keep to the right path.

name: Jin (Progress)
meaning: the sun rises over the earth; bright progress, deserved reward.

name: Ming Yi (Darkening of Light)
meaning: light wounded; conceal brilliance, persevere through the dark season.

name: Jia Ren (The Family)
meaning: each member in their role makes the house strong; clarity at home.

name: Kui (Opposition)
meaning: fire and lake diverge; small reconciliations succeed, great ones do not.

name: Jian (Obstruction)
meaning: an abyss before the mountain; seek help, take the long way around.

name: Jie (Deliverance)
meaning: the storm breaks; act swiftly while the way is clear, do not linger.

name: Sun (Decrease)
meaning: decrease below to increase above; sincere offerings, however modest, succeed.

name: Yi (Increase)
meaning: those above give to those below; the river fills, the time to undertake.

name: Guai (Breakthrough)
meaning: expose the matter at the court; resolute clarity, not stealth, prevails.

name: Gou (Coming to Meet)
meaning: a single yin returns; do not embrace what should not be welcomed.

name: Cui (Gathering Together)
meaning: the gathering succeeds with a clear center; offerings made, ranks held.

name: Sheng (Pushing Upward)
meaning: wood grows from earth; steady, unforced ascent finds great success.

name: Kun (Oppression)
meaning: the lake without water; speak little, act with integrity through scarcity.

name: Jing (The Well)
meaning: the village moves, the well remains; tend the source that feeds all.

name: Ge (Revolution)
meaning: fire under lake; only when the time is ripe is the change believed.

name: Ding (The Cauldron)
meaning: the sacred cauldron — what is raw is cooked, what is base is transformed.

name: Zhen (The Arousing Thunder)
meaning: thunder rolls; the wise startle, then laugh and return to the sacrifice.

name: Gen (Keeping Still)
meaning: stillness at the back; act only when self is quiet, then no fault.

name: Jian (Development)
meaning: the wild goose ascends step by step; gradual, ordered advance succeeds.

name: Gui Mei (Marrying Maiden)
meaning: knowing your place in an irregular arrangement averts misfortune.

name: Feng (Abundance)
meaning: the sun at noon must decline; rejoice in fullness, prepare for shadow.

name: Lü (The Wanderer)
meaning: a stranger in a strange land; small matters succeed through courtesy.

name: Xun (The Gentle Wind)
meaning: the wind enters everywhere; subtle, repeated influence accomplishes the work.

name: Dui (The Joyous Lake)
meaning: lake upon lake; mutual encouragement, but truth must underlie the smile.

name: Huan (Dispersion)
meaning: the wind moves over water; dissolve hard-heartedness, reunite the scattered.

name: Jie (Limitation)
meaning: the joints of bamboo; limitation gives form — but galling limits do not last.

name: Zhong Fu (Inner Truth)
meaning: the heart open as an empty boat; truth moves even pigs and fishes.

name: Xiao Guo (Small Exceeding)
meaning: the bird should not fly too high; succeed in small matters, not great.

name: Ji Ji (After Completion)
meaning: all in order — but order decays; guard against complacency at the peak.

name: Wei Ji (Before Completion)
meaning: the fox crosses the ice; nearly there — wet not your tail at the last step.
